title: Fortune's Formula
author: William Poundstone
notes: The story of the Kelly criterion, information theory, and the gamblers and quants who used it. Great narrative intro to sizing bets.

title: A Man for All Markets
author: Edward O. Thorp
notes: Thorp's memoir — beating blackjack, then the market. A model for thinking about edge and risk.

title: Thinking, Fast and Slow
author: Daniel Kahneman
notes: Foundational on cognitive biases. A bit long, but the core ideas matter for decision-making under uncertainty.
